title: $\mathcal Z$-stability of $\mathrm{C}(X)\rtimesО“$
abstract: Let $(X, О“)$ be a free and minimal topological dynamical system, where $X$ is a separable compact Hausdorff space and $О“$ is a countable infinite discrete amenable group. It is shown that if $(X, О“)$ has the Uniform Rokhlin Property and Cuntz comparison of open sets, then $\mathrm{mdim}(X, О“)=0$ implies that $(\mathrm{C}(X) \rtimesО“)\otimes\mathcal Z \cong \mathrm{C}(X) \rtimesО“$, where $\mathrm{mdim}$ is the mean dimension and $\mathcal Z$ is the Jiang-Su algebra. In particular, in this case, $\mathrm{mdim}(X, О“)=0$ implies that the C*-algebra $\mathrm{C}(X) \rtimesО“$ is classified by the Elliott invariant.
